plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Roamer needs your location to track your run, including in the background when your screen is off.
plugins.locationAlwaysUsageDescription: Roamer tracks your run in the background so you don't have to keep your screen on.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Roamer to save share cards to your photo library.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow Roamer to save share cards to your photo library.
